issues.title: Table name typo
issues.problem: The table name 'customerss' is incorrect. It should be 'dim_customer'.

issues.title: Lack of column selection
issues.problem: The query selects all columns from the table, which is not efficient or readable.
issues.fix: select customer_id, customer_name, email, tier, signup_date, city from sigma_analytics.dim_customer;

review.corrected_sql: select customer_id, customer_name, email, tier, signup_date, city from sigma_analytics.dim_customer;
review.summary: The query had a critical typo in the table name and lacked specific column selection, affecting readability.
